notes:
NovaPanel v0.7.27

- Helper extract phase: ZIP-entry pre-validation + post-extract integrity check. v0.7.26 helper logs proved that resources/app.asar in the staged tempDir was 0 bytes and asar parser reported ENOENT - the existing extract phase only verified NovaPanel.exe presence, never inspected resources/app.asar at all, so corruption (ZIP-side OR Expand-Archive truncation) sailed through to copy and verify phases.
- New native ZIP central-directory inspector inspectZipEntries() walks EOCD/Z64-EOCD and CD records to read compressed + uncompressed size + method per entry without external dependencies. Logs ZIP app.asar compressed size, uncompressed size, and method BEFORE extraction. Hard-fails extract phase if entry is missing, zero-byte uncompressed, or suspiciously tiny (<100 KB).
- Post-extract: stats <contentRoot>/resources/app.asar, compares size to ZIP uncompressed size. Hard-fails on missing / zero-byte / size mismatch. Logs resources/ inventory (first 30 entries) for diagnostics.
- Phase wrapper unchanged - any failure throws inside runPhaseGated(extract,...) so the marker is PHASE FAIL name=extract and copy phase never runs. PHASE 5 verify, copy phase v0.7.25 protections, deep-link mode, harness, release, build scripts: byte-identical to v0.7.26.
